.file-embed.background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-embed.background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgba(24, 20, 33, 0.5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-leaf-content.background: rgba(19, 16, 26, 0.6) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(158, 110, 242, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(38, 38, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(153, 94, 0, 0.5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(27, 27, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
